fields.label: Document Category
fields.options:
Title Document
Revenue Record
Encumbrance Record
Compliance Document
Legal Opinion
Other
fields.description: Classify the document to enable quick filtering and completeness checks

fields.label: Document Type
fields.options:
Sale Deed
Gift Deed
Partition Deed
Release Deed
Will / Succession Certificate
Court Decree
Government Allotment Order
Power of Attorney
Agreement of Sale
Pahani (ROR)
Adangal
1-B Register
FMB Sketch
Tippan
Revenue Sketch
Pattadar Passbook
Village Map
EC
Non-Encumbrance Certificate
Land Conversion Order
NOC
Survey / Demarcation Report
Advocate Title Certificate
Link Document
Other
fields.description: Specific document type — filtered by category in client script

fields.label: Document Number
fields.description: Registration number or reference number on the document

fields.label: Document Date
fields.description: Date of issue, execution, or registration

fields.label: Period From
fields.description: For EC: start of encumbrance search period. For Pahani: crop year start.

fields.label: Period To
fields.description: For EC: end of encumbrance search period. For Pahani: crop year end.

fields.label: Validity / Expiry Date
fields.description: EC validity (typically 3-6 months from issue). Pahani validity (crop year). NOC expiry.

fields.label: Issued By
fields.description: Authority or person who issued the document (e.g., Sub-Registrar, Tahsildar, Advocate)

fields.label: Issuing Office
fields.description: Specific office (e.g., SRO Shamshabad, Tahsildar Office Medchal)

fields.label: File Attachment
fields.description: Upload the scanned document (PDF, JPG, or PNG)

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Notes about document authenticity, condition, or relevance

fields.label: Verification Status
fields.description: Legal team's manual verification status — independent of OCR

fields.label: Verified By
fields.description: Set by legal team after document review and authentication

fields.label: Verification Date
fields.description: Auto-set when Verified By is saved

fields.label: Verification Remarks
fields.description: Legal team's notes on authenticity, discrepancies, or conditions

fields.label: OCR Status
fields.description: OCR extraction status — set to Verified after human review of extracted data

fields.label: OCR Extracted Data
fields.description: JSON data extracted by OCR engine — for legal team review

name: Encumbrance Document
description: Land document repository — stores all legal, revenue, encumbrance, and compliance documents with verification tracking and OCR capabilities.
